name: Apple Cheddar Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cups crushed stone-ground whole wheat crackers
2 large tart apples, peeled, cored, and sliced (2 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onion in butter or margarine until tender.
2. Stir in crushed crackers and nuts. Press mixture into a 9-inch pie plate, forming a crust. Bake at 350 degrees for 8 to 10 minutes.
3. Meanwhile, simmer apples in a small amount of water for 3 to 5 minutes, or until tender. Drain; arrange apples in the crust.
4. In a blender container or food processor bowl, blend eggs, cheese, milk, 1/2 teaspoon salt, and a dash of pepper until smooth. Pour into the crust.
5. Sprinkle nutmeg on top. Bake at 325 degrees for about 45 minutes, or until a knife inserted off-center comes out clean.
6. Let stand for 10 minutes. Makes 5 servings.
